sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14583" key="a)/puos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄπῡος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n14583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not suppurating,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
